items.question: What is UGC content?
items.answer: UGC (User-Generated Content style) is social-native content that feels authentic while still being professionally produced for your brand goals.

items.question: Do you work with brands outside Belgium?
items.answer: Yes. Based in Belgium, Denise works with both local and international brands, remotely or on-site when required.

items.question: In which languages can you create content?
items.answer: French, Dutch and English — both spoken and written content.

items.question: What types of events do you cover?
items.answer: Weddings, hospitality experiences, venue showcases, private events, brand launches and premium activations.

items.question: How fast is delivery?
items.answer: Turnaround depends on scope, but same-day and fast-delivery options are available for live events and urgent campaigns.

items.question: Do you offer raw footage?
items.answer: Yes, raw footage can be added depending on package and usage needs.

items.question: Can content be used for paid ads?
items.answer: Yes. Ad usage rights can be included in your agreement, with options tailored to campaign duration and channels.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: How we collect and use your personal data.
privacy.intro: This privacy policy explains how Content by Denise (contentbydenise.com) collects, uses and protects your personal data in compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

sections.title: 1. Data controller
sections.content: Denise Fabiano, operating as Content by Denise, is the data controller for personal data collected through this website. Contact: denise_fabiano@outlook.com

sections.title: 2. Data we collect
sections.content: We collect the following data when you submit the contact form: your name, email address, company/brand name, Instagram or website URL, project type, desired date, and your message. We do not collect data through cookies beyond essential analytics.

sections.title: 3. How we use your data
sections.content: Your data is used exclusively to respond to your inquiry and to provide the requested content creation services. We do not sell, share, or transfer your personal data to third parties.

sections.title: 4. Data retention
sections.content: We retain your contact data for as long as necessary to process your inquiry and any resulting service agreement, and no longer than 3 years thereafter.

sections.title: 5. Your rights
sections.content: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, correct, delete, or restrict the processing of your personal data. To exercise these rights, contact us at denise_fabiano@outlook.com.

sections.title: 6. Analytics
sections.content: This website uses Google Analytics 4 to understand traffic and user behaviour. Analytics data is anonymised and does not personally identify you.

sections.title: 7. Contact
sections.content: For any privacy-related questions, contact: denise_fabiano@outlook.com
